topics.title: Ciara Miller on Amanda Batula + West Wilson: 'Major Mindf--k'
topics.hook: Ciara said she felt more betrayed by Amanda than by West — and that one quote is a thesis about how we treat platonic loyalty vs. romantic loyalty.
topics.angle: The real Summer House breakup is the Ciara/Amanda friendship. We have elaborate rules for romantic love and vibes for platonic bonds. LLMA angle: intentional partnership applies to ALL partnerships.
topics.buzz: High — Bravo + E! + TMZ + NBC News all covering. April 17-20 comment sections are exploding.

topics.title: Platonic Life Partners: 13.5M TikTok Views and Rising
topics.hook: The #PlatonicLifePartner hashtag has 13.5M TikTok views and Gen Z is building intentional partnerships with their best friends instead of conventional romantic relationships.
topics.angle: Over half of Gen Z values friendship above romantic relationships. Platonic partnerships are becoming a real structural alternative to traditional marriage — and people are designing them intentionally.
topics.buzz: High — Refinery29, i-D, Dazed, BuzzFeed all have long-reads. TikTok and Reddit very active.

topics.title: Gen Z Redefining Marriage: 58% Say It's Optional, Not Mandatory
topics.hook: The Knot Worldwide's 2026 Future of Marriage report shows Gen Z overwhelmingly sees marriage as a choice, not an institution — and interest in lavender marriages is up 200% since 2020.
topics.angle: When economic necessity falls away, the 'why' of partnership gets interesting. Gen Z isn't anti-relationship — they're pro-intentional. That's exactly the LLMA audience.
topics.buzz: Medium-High — The Knot Worldwide report dropped in 2026, good SEO potential.

pop_culture_hook: Summer House Season 10 — Ciara Miller 'major mindf--k' quote re: Amanda Batula + West Wilson
